reasoning: The Lean signature faithfully captures the informal claim. `[TopologicalSpace G] [Group G] [IsTopologicalGroup G]` encodes "topological group"; `C = connectedComponent (1 : G)` encodes "C is the component containing the identity" (the identity of a multiplicative group is `1`, which is what `e` denotes informally). The conclusion `∃ H : Subgroup G, (H : Set G) = C ∧ H.Normal` is the standard Mathlib idiom for asserting that the set C is the underlying set of a normal subgroup — it is equivalent to "C is a normal subgroup of G". No hypothesis is added or dropped, and no quantifier structure is altered.
